_comment: ══ SERVICES ══ Add/remove/edit cards freely. 'icon' must match a key in components/ui/Icons.tsx

services.title: AI Automation
services.description: End-to-end intelligent systems that eliminate repetitive work and run your operations on autopilot, 24/7.

services.title: AI Agents
services.description: Autonomous agents that qualify leads, answer queries and take action across your tools — like hiring a tireless digital employee.

services.title: Lead Automation
services.description: Capture, score, route and nurture every property lead instantly — so no enquiry is ever left cold.

services.title: CRM Automation
services.description: Deep CRM integrations that sync data, trigger follow-ups and keep your pipeline immaculate without manual entry.

services.title: Chatbots
services.description: Multilingual AI chatbots for your website and socials that convert visitors into booked viewings around the clock.

services.title: Workflow Automation
services.description: n8n, Make & Zapier pipelines that connect your entire stack into one seamless, self-running machine.

services.title: WhatsApp Automation
services.description: Automated WhatsApp journeys — instant replies, drip campaigns and viewing reminders where Dubai clients actually respond.

services.title: OpenAI Integration
services.description: GPT-powered features embedded into your products and processes: summaries, drafting, extraction and decisioning.

services.title: Real Estate Automation
services.description: Purpose-built automation for listings, portals, viewings and agent workflows — designed for the Dubai market.

services.title: Business Process Automation
services.description: Audit, redesign and automate core business processes to cut costs and unlock scale without new headcount.
